description: Evaluate REQUIREMENT POINT TO CHECK against the ATTACHED INTERNAL PROCESS DOCUMENT markdown below. Return one structured compliance object (or a one-element array). No markdown fences or conversational text.

requirement_id.description: The exact clause number and header title being evaluated (e.g. '2.4 Internal Controls').

requirement_text.description: The explicit rule or obligation text provided under REQUIREMENT POINT TO CHECK.

uae_response_compliance_level.description: Page [Number], Section [Header Code]: '[Exact matching quote from the attached document]'. If Non-Compliant, output exactly: No corresponding procedure found.

comply_status.description: Must be strictly one of: Compliant | Partial Compliant | Non-Compliant. Compliant requires uae_response_compliance_level to contain a Page/Section verbatim quote from the attached document.

compliance_confidence_percentage.description: 0–100 aligned with status: Compliant 86–100 (100 only if every sub-condition covered), Partial 31–85, Non-Compliant 0–30.

fulfilled_clauses.description: Bullet lines starting with • for each sub-condition of the requirement that IS covered by the internal document. Output None if nothing is covered.

corrective_action_plan.description: Required when Partial or Non-Compliant. Start with Gap(s): then numbered items (1) Missing: [exact sub-condition from requirement not evidenced], Fix: [operational action]. Name every gap — never use vague text like 'one or more sub-conditions'. Empty string when Compliant.

suggested_responsibility.description: Department or role responsible for the corrective action. Must be empty string when Compliant.
